plot outline: An intertwined drama about the United States' war on drugs, seen through the eyes of a once conservative judge, now newly-appointed drug czar, his heroin-addicted daughter, two DEA agents, a jailed drug kingpin's wife, and a Mexican cop who begins to question his boss's motives.
title: Traffic

other companies.name: Troop, Steuber, Pasich, Reddick & Tobey LLP
